conflict: The expanding scale of what the manuscript reveals — from 'interesting old magic' to 'there was a civilization that used magic as a medium of existence and they left Earth and they set wards around the planet before going'
consequence: Informational and tonal — the cosmic scope of the novel opens. Gavin understands that the First Art was created by beings for whom magic was as fundamental as air, that they departed Earth, and that they set planetary wards to protect what they left behind
must_land_beats: The Builders must feel genuinely alien: beings for whom magic was not a tool but a medium of existence. Not wizards with better wands — something categorically different

The distinction between 'died' and 'left' must be precise. The Builders relocated, not through space but through a category of existence that the manuscript's notation can represent but that Gavin can only approximate
The wards: planetary-scale structures set to make Earth undetectable. Not defensive barriers but filters — they remove Earth from a category of attention
pressure_source: The expanding scale of what the manuscript reveals — from 'interesting old magic' to 'there was a civilization that used magic as a medium of existence and they left Earth and they set wards around the planet before going'
